prompt: Modify the position of the skeletal rig bones and controls to pose the bird as if it is flapping its wings mid-flight.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which shows a 3D bird model with a visible skeletal rig and control points. Modify the position of the skeletal rig bones and controls to re-pose the bird as if it is actively flapping its wings mid-flight. Ensure the wings are dynamically angled, suggesting an ongoing flapping motion (e.g., one wing up, the other down, or both at an intermediate point of a stroke). The overall pose of the bird, including its body and limbs, should convey it is airborne, while still retaining the visibility of the skeletal rig and controls.
objects: Bird's wings dynamically angled in a flapping motion
Bird's body in an airborne pose
Bird's legs in an airborne pose
